segments.text: We have assembled here to celebrate the Sahasrara Day, which was opened in 1970 on this date.
I find that beautiful canopy is like our Sahastra and so very apt
to have this beautiful arrangement for Sahastrara.
We need understand what happens when the Sahasrara opens,
When Kundalini passes through five centers
it enters into an area which we call as limbic area
This area is all surrounded by thousand nerves
And when these nerves get enlightened, they look like flames of bibji or colors – seven
colours and very mindfully beautifully shining emitting peace.
But the kundalini starts emiting its vibration on the sides all this nerves gets enlightened
gradually, and start moving on all directions opening the Sahasrara.
And then a Kundalini emerges out through the fontanel bone area which we call as Brahmarandha
Randra means the whole, and the Brahma is all-pervading power of God's love.
So it enters into this subtle energy which we do not feel normally but then the chaitanya
And the vibrations which are part and parcel of this energy, all-pervading power – the
Paramchaitanya.
They start entering into our brain and showering their blessings in that limbic area they
Now the limbic area is connected to all the areas of brain and also to nerves.
So it starts flowing onto your nerves, giving you a new awareness called as Samuhik Chetana
So you get a new Chaitanya, a New Awareness which is showered upon your limbic area.
The working of these Chaitanya waves are very interesting
They're normally formed like small commas
but then they go into different forms
They make themselves into swastikas as the four-limbed symbol of innocence, or they become
the omkara.
As you know how Om is written here which are a symbol for our doing and awareness.
So when they form the swastika,
They try to nourish
The left side
And then they form the omkara
Then nourished right side
Left and Right Sympathetic Nervous System
But Sahasrara is
To be kept open
Is rather difficult for people
Because it's a vicious circle
First these vibrations
enter into your brain through the Brahmarandra when it is opened out, and they should nourish
you nerves by which left-and right side open up.
And so more Chaitanya can flow down all these centers but if your Sahastrara not properly
open, this process doesn't take place.
As a result of that the chakras don´t open – the Kundalini only has very few strands
is kept in spinal cord and new strands cannot rise because your chakras are not opened
So in Sahaja Yoga it is very important to keep your Sahastrara open, otherwise there's
a vicious circle.
To the keep the Sahasrara opened – this way easy as well as difficult!
As you have known that at Sahastra Re, Mahamaya comes she has a mahamayana not
Not easy to recognize her, not easy to know Her.
She lives just like you she moves Just Like You and
And you can never make out Her real nature
She is in the form of Mahamaya
So at Sahasrara To recognize
The Mahamayya Is another vicious circle
You may say that, why should it be Mahamaya?
It would have been better as talkingly some other form.
But any of the forms could not
had worked out Sahaja Yoga in modern times
because people will have been frightened and upset
And they never taken to Sahajyoga
Because there was no discretion already
within them what is right or wrong

In the Mahamayya form you have to recognize, this
another test because Mahamaya
You cannot recognize while

you've seen so many photographs which should
convince people mentally about
This Mahamaya Swarupa

Even when I came to Napoli the policeman and everybody was given a photograph
And they all recognized that this is something really different
They wanted shake hands with me
This one way
Another ways are that we start seeing blessings
And you start seeing how you become so progressively, better materially physically emotionally and
spiritually.
Still on a mental level most of the people recognize but unless an entity it is recognized
in heart there's no recognition already The Heart is surrounded by seven auras
of the seven chakras and the Spirit, the Atma resides in
heart. As it is on top your head here
resides God Almighty Sadashiva
So when Kundalini touches that point
Your spirit gets awakened
And light of the Spirit starts spreading
It start acting
on your central nervous system because automatically the vibrations of the Chaitanya flow into
you brain who enlighten your nerves.
But still, that recognition in heart is not there even without that we start feeling
the cool breeze, you can raise the Kundalini of others.
You can cure people –you do many things but still it is not yet felt in your heart
so much that's why we have music and art all these thing start opening our hearts
But still it is not recognition, because recognition
Is a mental activity of the heart.
How can Heart have a Mental Activity?
This another problem you all

That recognition
If Itis A mental activity Of The Heart
how do we do
Say
if You are a Christian born in a Christian family
As soon as they see the photograph
of Christ, immediately you feel it's Christ or something.
Or if your are a Hindu and see the photograph

that is kind thing recognition in heart
but the recognition
somebody living with You

Of Your mental activities only
But to go deep down into your heart, what should we do people tell you.

How this mental activity can performed through the heart
Now You must remember that Heart is absolutely connected with brain
Absolutely connected
It's not disconnected thing
If it was would have worked
When heart fails, after some time brain also fails.
The whole body goes out of order
If the child is crying please take off your child
You better take-out that child
Something wrong with a child if he's crying
So this mental activity
Of the heart
Is to be understood this way
That as soon you see danger

your heart starts pumping more blood and you get palpitation.

just if see supposing a tiger standing before

it is an reflex action

You'll Start Feeling
that there should be some protection
That we Should do something about it.
But

Just run

just keep on running

all this
in your brain that as soon

it should just make

It is in the central nervous system built-in.

Any response like this
is built within you

your heart

they informed Me that

he has absolutely into his divinity

i am person who doesn't think about anything

i know that I am under your protection and don't have to worry.
